cards.back: An iterative and incremental framework for managing and completing complex projects, emphasizing teamwork and accountability
A linear approach to project management, where each phase is completed before moving on to the next one, without iteration or feedback
A flexible and adaptive approach to project management, emphasizing iterative development, continuous improvement, and customer satisfaction
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow, limiting work in progress, and maximizing efficiency
A management philosophy that aims to minimize waste, maximize value, and optimize processes, often used in software development and project management
